# 96. Migrate Celery Broker to Redis

**Date:** 2026-04-08

**Optional per env:** _required on all environments_


## CommCare Version Dependency
This change is not known to be dependent on any particular version of CommCare.


## Change Context
On June 1st, 2026, we will be dropping support for RabbitMQ as a broker for celery.

## Details
In an effort to simplify the CommCare tech stack, we have decided
to drop support for RabbitMQ as a broker for celery, relying solely
on Redis. This change will take effect on June 1st, 2026.
Since Redis is already used for caching, this reduces the
number of backing services needed to run CommCare.

## Steps to update
As noted in the instructions below, you may already have
Redis configured as the celery broker in your environment, in which
case no action is needed. See the instructions below for more
information on how to determine if that is the case.

Follow [these instructions](https://commcare-cloud.readthedocs.io/en/latest/services/rabbitmq/migrate-to-redis.html) to migrate.
